task.label: Ensure applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time
for category AM only if so required by the Member State

task.label: Require a medical examination

conditions.condition: in respect of applications for driving licences of categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed
for category AM only if so required by the Member State

task.label: Apply alternative measures instead of requiring a medical examination

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III

task.label: Require the applicant or holder to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III

task.label: Fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence
if required by the Member State

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE

exception.description: to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III

task.label: React to significant changes in physical or mental fitness

conditions.condition: after the driving licence has been issued to the applicant following a medical examination or self-assessment

task.label: Provide appropriate measures to address non-compliance
Apply the alternative measure to allow the monitoring of fitness to drive
Monitor fitness to drive

conditions.condition: during periods of administrative validity

task.label: Ensure the applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination

conditions.condition: prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence
if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III

task.label: Undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence
if it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge
Adopt guidelines for medical practitioners
Inform the Commission of the adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

task.label: Make the guidelines available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners

task.label: Develop public awareness campaigns
Inform the Commission of the public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns

task.label: Make the campaign information available to the other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns

task.label: Set stricter standards for the issuance or renewal of driving licences
